data.content: Shipment review approved on main at 06a663ef3c42. Verified HEAD and origin/main both point to the shipped merge commit, confirmed commit tags include 500874fb1e6c, 294904cd55af, and 06a663ef3c42, and confirmed CI workflow run 23106253250 completed successfully for commit 06a663ef3c42 on 2026-03-15. Reviewed the shipped diff in src/components/agent-history-view.tsx and src/components/__tests__/agent-history-view-debug-integration.test.ts: the history debugger now targets the user-selected conversation instead of always defaulting to the first session. Validated the debugging prompt contract still includes Expected Outcome and Actual Outcome plus 2-4 knot-convertible next-step options in src/lib/history-debug-prompt.ts. Ran targeted regression coverage with bun test for the history debug panel, prompt builder, and selected-session integration tests; all 14 tests passed.
